title: Educational Series Archetype Registry

archetypes.label: Vedic Mathematics Learning Series
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: No unsupported scriptural attribution; Sanskrit and historical claims require source discipline.

archetypes.label: Genetics and Mutations Learning Series
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Scientific and health-related claims require credible references and non-medical-advice framing.

archetypes.label: Engines and Technology Evolution Learning Series
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Technical claims must separate simplified explanation from engineering precision.

archetypes.label: Health Diagnosis Fundamentals Learning Series
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Must not provide diagnosis or treatment advice; must remain educational and source-backed.

archetypes.label: AI for Public Systems Learning Series
archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
archetypes.source_caution: Public-system claims require policy, institutional, technical or credible editorial source checks.

use_rule: Archetypes are examples/templates only. No archetype becomes a selected topic without AG24B scoring and later editorial selection.
